note: DIFF HISTORY chart Slingshot marker now visible at a glance. Previous v125 marker (small magenta dot + faint halo) was too subtle and got lost on top of the purple line. New three-layer rendering: (A) vertical magenta accent line at the block position spanning full chart height (alpha 0.28, 1.5 px), (B) glowing dot — outer halo 8 px alpha 0.10, mid halo 5 px alpha 0.32, solid 3 px core, white 0.75 outline for contrast, (C) small magenta triangle at the chart top pointing down at the block. Same dual-gate detection logic as v125. Counter at the right of the strip unchanged. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
